description: Create a new custom property on a HubSpot CRM object
preconditions: Property internal name does not already exist on this object

execution_methods.preference_reason: Stable, fast, no UI drift. Use this whenever available.

path_parameters.objectType: The plural internal name (contacts, companies, deals, tickets) — from the object entry

required_payload_fields.description: Internal name. Cannot be changed after creation. Must be lowercase with underscores.
Display label shown in the HubSpot UI
Data type. Values: string, number, date, datetime, enumeration, bool
UI rendering. Values: text, textarea, number, select, radio, checkbox, booleancheckbox, date, calculation_equation
Internal name of the property group. MUST use standard HubSpot groups: 'contactinformation' for contacts, 'companyinformation' for companies, 'dealinformation' for deals. DO NOT invent new groups.

conditional_payload_fields.when: fieldType is select, radio, or checkbox

optional_payload_fields.description: Property description shown in HubSpot UI
Boolean — whether values must be unique
Whether property can be used in forms

success_response.body: Full property object including the created internal name

known_failures.likely_cause: Property with this internal name already exists (possibly archived)
known_failures.recovery: Check if the existing property meets requirements. If yes, treat as success. If no, propose a different internal name to consultant.

known_failures.likely_cause: groupName references a property group that doesn't exist on this object
known_failures.recovery: Call groups endpoint to verify available group names. Surface to consultant if group needs to be created first.

known_failures.likely_cause: Some combinations are not allowed (e.g., type=string with fieldType=number)
known_failures.recovery: Refer to capability entry's available_field_types for valid combinations.

known_failures.likely_cause: Private App token lacks crm.schemas.{object}.write scope
known_failures.recovery: Surface as setup error — consultant needs to update Private App scopes.

execution_methods.preference_reason: Fallback if API is unavailable. Primary method for products without configuration APIs (Gainsight, HighRadius).

navigation.url_redirect_behavior: URL without ?type= redirects to ?type=0-1 by default. URL without ?action=create lands on the listing page.

url_parameters.object_type_id: From object entry (contacts=0-1, companies=0-2, deals=0-3, tickets=0-5)

menu_path: Select object dropdown → Contact properties (or appropriate object)

steps.side_effect: Internal name auto-populates from label (lowercased, spaces→underscores)

steps.intent: Click Edit more options to open full settings wizard
Click Next to proceed to field type settings

steps.skippable_when: plan.field_type is 'text' (single-line text is the default)

steps.intent: Click Next to proceed to validation settings

verification.expected: Property appears in the properties list
